mission.title: coredns: plugin/cache: Add option to adjust SERVFAIL response cache TTL
mission.description:
### 1. Why is this pull request needed and what does it do?

Add an option to customize SERVFAIL response cache TTL within RFC 2308 allowances.
Setting a 0 TTL will disable caching of SERVFAIL responses.

### 2. Which issues (if any) are related?

closes #5074

### 3. Which documentation changes (if any) need to be made?

included

### 4. Does this introduce a backward incompatible change or deprecation?

no

resolution.summary:
gobencher flaked with the error:

```
Initializing: exit status 128:
fatal: cannot mkdir /home/cuong/go/src/github.com/chrisohaver/coredns-0: No space left on device
```

 Clicking "re-run" does not appear to result in a re-run.

Clicking "[View more details on gobencher](https://dashboard.github.orijtech.com/benchmark/5224ac2959cc42b087b1fc643489927e)" results a mostly blank page.

cc @odeke-em
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
